emails.subject: ISDA US Regulatory Weekly Conference Call
emails.subject_base: ISDA US Regulatory Weekly Conference Call
emails.body: ISDA US Regulatory Weekly Conference Call Mark, can you participate in the ISDA call on Friday? As you know Mark will be out of the office on vacation.
